strengths: 15+ years full-stack experience spanning Node.js, TypeScript, React, and multiple languages
Active AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq including MCP code generators
Strong testing/TDD background with own assertion library and workshops on testing
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in stack
Limited evidence of Kotlin; Java exposure is older (robotic arms, mobile orchestration)
Cloud platform specifics (AWS/GCP/Azure) only briefly cited (AWS CDK at Optilyz)

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and thin Kotlin evidence

response.justification: Candidate exceeds the 6+ years bar with deep full-stack TS/Node/React work at Optilyz, RIDE, and re:cinq, and directly matches the AI-agent requirement via current MCP and agentic-workflow tooling at re:cinq. Testing expertise is well-evidenced (Fluent-Asserts, Trial, Selenium course, TDD at RIDE). Database (MongoDB at Optilyz, MySQL/SQL in skills), Docker, and AWS CDK cover infra basics, though specific Nest.js experience is absent and Kotlin is not cited. Architecture and scalability are supported by high-throughput microservices work at Dunnhumby.
